top_signals.title: Goldman Sees Turkey Likely Tolerating Faster Lira Slide
top_signals.summary: Goldman Sachs economists expect Turkey to allow a more rapid depreciation of the lira in order to prioritize external-balance stabilization over disinflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Microsoft Patches a Record 570 Security Flaws
top_signals.summary: Microsoft Corp. today released software updates to plug at least 570 security holes in its Windows operating systems and other software, almost triple the number of vulnerabilities the software giant fixed in its record-smashing Patch Tuesday release last month. Microsoft attributed the burgeoning patch counts to vulnerability discoveries aided by artificial intelligence.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The Blood Bank and the Logistics of Wartime Medicine
top_signals.summary:
Before the twentieth century gave armies antibiotics, the leading killer of American soldiers in wartime was neither enemy fire nor shrapnel. Two-thirds of the roughly 620,000 deaths in the U.S. Civil War came from diseases like typhoid and dysentery. Spread through contaminated water and crowded camps, they were eventually controlled through inoculation and field sanitation rather than the antibiotics that would not arrive until the following generation. Later in World War I, American forces lost more men to disease than to combat: 63,000 to 51,000.By 1940, military medicine had largely closed that gap. The post The Blood Bank and the Logistics of Wartime Medicine appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: JetBlue wins Spirit slots at LaGuardia Airport, eyes move to Marine Air Terminal as airlines fight for space
top_signals.summary: JetBlue Airways won takeoff and landing slots for up to 12 roundtrip flights at LaGuardia Airport.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
